key.name: helper-path
key.description: Custom helper executable path. When set to the default, the extension uses its bundled GJS helper.

key.name: refresh-interval-seconds
key.description: How often the extension refreshes provider data.

key.name: enabled-providers
key.description: The providers visible in the extension overview.

key.name: last-selected-tab
key.description: The last provider tab selected in the popup.

key.name: show-source-label
key.description: Whether to show the provider source string in the popup detail view.

key.name: show-extra-credits
key.description: Whether to show supplemental credits or extra usage lines in provider detail views.
